Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 60 

SRVC_DT 

LABEL: RX Service Date 

DESCRIPTION: This field contains the date on which the prescription was filled. 

SHORT NAME: SRVC_DT 

LONG NAME: SRVC_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: Date formatted as CCYYMMDD 

COMMENT: —
